calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-10-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Feb-15-28 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Oct-06-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances via Zoom Conference:
Jerry Wang, Esq., of Huron Legal Group, PC. Tel: 248-602-3555 for moving party.
No other appearances made in this matter.

A hearing is required. The matter was heard and discussed. Upon conclusion of the proceedings rules as follows:

DEFENDANT AMBER DESCY's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is Granted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
